copies.signals: One forecast per day, always based on the previous close.
copies.analysis: Compare the past and project the future without skipping sessions.
copies.backtest: Simulate capital and trades without using future information.

form.question: What do you want to analyze?

help.signals: Future sessions receive preliminary forecasts and are recalculated after each new close.
help.analysis: The past shows one signal per session. The future uses the latest available close and remains pending.
help.backtest: The model is retrained periodically and reinvests all capital after each non-overlapping trade.

form.disclaimer: Acceptances are simulated records. No order is sent to a broker.

errors.tickerAndDates: Enter a ticker and date range.
errors.invalidApiAddress: The API address must start with http:// or https://.
errors.horizonWhole: The horizon must be a whole number of trading sessions.
errors.initialCapital: Enter an initial capital greater than zero.
errors.analysisUnsupported: Your local API does not provide session-by-session analysis. Update to backend 2.0.0 and restart Uvicorn.
errors.dailyAnalysis: Unable to run the daily analysis.
errors.modelUnsupported: Your local API does not accept model selection. Update to backend 2.0.0 and restart Uvicorn.

loading.title: Calculating signals
loading.copy: The model uses only the information known at each close.

position.title: Simulated position
position.recordGuidance: Record an acceptance only after you decide to act on a signal.
position.howToRecordCopy: Use the button inside the selected session card. Its date and reference price are applied automatically.
position.resetConfirm: Delete all simulated buys and sells for {{ticker}}?

compatibility.title: Outdated local API
compatibility.beforeCode: The response does not contain multi-horizon forecasts. Update

daily.saveReference: {{date}} and its reference price will be saved to the local database.
daily.acceptSell: I accepted the sell on this date
daily.acceptBuy: I accepted the buy on this date

analysis.marketDaysRemoved: {{count}} non-trading days were removed. Each valid session in the range has a card.
analysis.periodNote: Latest close: {{latestClose}} · historical outcomes after {{historicalHorizon}} sessions · retraining every {{frequency}} sessions · API v{{version}}.

backtest.periodNote: Model used: {{model}} · requested period: {{start}} to {{end}} · first signal on {{firstSignal}} · last exit on {{lastExit}} · {{horizon}}-session horizon.

descriptions.random_forest: An ensemble of randomly sampled decision trees.
descriptions.ensemble: Average probabilities from the three boosting models.
